chapter_title.ar: باب إِصْلَاحِ الْمَالِ وَ تَقْدِيرِ الْمَعِيشَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – Correcting the wealth and managing the livelihood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/36)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/36)
text: الْكَمَالُ كُلُّ الْكَمَالِ فِي ثَلَاثَةٍ وَ ذَكَرَ فِي الثَّلَاثَةِ التَّقْدِيرَ فِي الْمَعِيشَةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Rabi’e, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The perfection, every perfection is in three (matters)’, and he<sup>asws</sup> mentioned regarding the third, being the management of the livelihood’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Rib’iy from a man who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘All of perfection is in three things.’ He mentioned in the third of the three things to be planning for one’s living.”
